description: House number component of a street address | Alphanumeric up to 10 characters (e.g. 12, 535, 358C)
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "hdb_resale_prices" WHERE NOT REGEXP_MATCHES(TRY_CAST(block AS TEXT), '^[A-Za-z0-9]{1,10}$')
name: AddressBlockHouseNumber

description: Street name component of a physical postal address | X(32) alphanumeric with spacing
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "hdb_resale_prices" WHERE NOT street_name IS NULL AND (LENGTH(TRY_CAST(street_name AS TEXT)) > 32 OR LENGTH(TRY_CAST(street_name AS TEXT)) = 0)
name: AddressStreetName
query:
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM "hdb_resale_prices"
WHERE street_name IS NOT NULL
  AND (
    LENGTH(CAST(street_name AS TEXT)) > 32
    OR LENGTH(CAST(street_name AS TEXT)) = 0
  );

description: Based on ISO 8601, assumed to be in UTC +8 | YYYY-MM
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "hdb_resale_prices" WHERE NOT REGEXP_MATCHES(TRY_CAST(month AS TEXT), '^[0-9]{4}-(0[1-9]|1[0-2])$')
name: Month

description: Based on ISO 8601, assumed to be in UTC +8 | YYYY
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "hdb_resale_prices" WHERE NOT REGEXP_MATCHES(TRY_CAST(lease_commence_date AS TEXT), '^[0-9]{4}$')
name: Year
